Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a textual representation of a BPMN like process for a multinational smartphone supply chain The goal is to generate 20 open ended thought provoking questions that cover Rationale behind the process flows Potential improvements Risk management Decision making Stakeholder communication Performance measurement

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are to avoid SQL queries and just list the questions

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets break down the process steps and think about each area

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1 Market Research Why is this step first How does it inform the rest 2 RandD Prototype What happens after the prototype How is it validated 3 Parallel Gateway split for securing components Why parallel What are the risks 4 Parallel Gateway join How is synchronization handled What if one component is delayed 5 Shipping components to Malaysia Why Malaysia What are the advantages 6 Assembly Why 24 7 How is quality maintained 7 Exclusive Gateway for quality How are defects categorized What triggers rework vs scrap 8 Packing and labeling What regulations must be followed 9 Parallel shipping air freight and cargo ship How are the routes chosen What is the cost trade off 10 Parallel Gateway join for shipping How are the shipments tracked What if one is delayed 11 Customs and regulatory What are the common delays How are compliance issues handled 12 Distribution centers Why multiple regions How are they managed 13 Parallel distribution tasks How are orders allocated What is the break bulk process 14 Parallel Gateway join after distribution How is inventory synchronized 15 Monitor inventory and sales forecast How is forecasting done What tools are used 16 Exclusive Gateway How are demand changes defined What triggers adjustments 17 End Event How is the cycle closed What are the lessons learned

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now we generate 20 questions that cover the above and more focusing on the required areas

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We have 20 questions They cover rationale improvements risk decision making communication and performance

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note the prompt says 20 open ended thought provoking questions We have 20
